allies.rationale_text: Systems-thinking keeps optimization attached to the structure of the whole system instead of chasing local improvement in isolation.
allies.source_quote: Systems Thinking: The entire discipline of systems thinking is oriented toward optimizing complex interactions.

allies.rationale_text: Constraints give optimization its real boundary conditions so the best option is defined by actual limits rather than by idealized freedom.
allies.source_quote: Works when constraints are real rather than decorative.

allies.rationale_text: Leverage-points sharpen optimization by directing effort toward the few system moves that change the outcome most.
allies.source_quote: Optimization necessitates filtering out the nonessential to focus on the core leverage points.

antagonists.rationale_text: Confirmation-bias makes optimization feel rigorous while quietly protecting the current objective, proxy, or favored frame from real challenge.
Risk-vs-uncertainty pushes back when optimization language pretends the problem is knowable enough for strict maximization instead of de-risking and resilience work.
antagonists.source_quote: The existence of Unknown Unknowns means optimization must shift to de-risking and resilience, rather than strict maximization.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Optimization-theory conflicts with non-linear-dynamics when optimization assumes smooth response surfaces in systems with discontinuous phase transitions.
structured_tensions.source_quote: optimization-theory conflicts with non-linear-dynamics (non-linear dynamics) when optimization assumes smooth response surfaces in systems with discontinuous phase transitions.

curation_notes.summary: The raw source is strong on systems alignment, real constraints, and proxy-risk antagonism, so the file preserves that bounded first-order surface.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor optimization relations beyond the strongest systems, constraints, leverage, and anti-false-certainty links.
open_questions: Game-theory pressure is source-real, but the retained set favors the strongest current-vocabulary neighbors already curated in this repo.
